info.description: API for managing employees, clients, authentication, and permissions.
info.title: User Service API

get.description: Returns a paginated list of actuaries with optional filtering by employee and actuary fields

patch.description: Updates an agent's limit and approval settings. Only supervisors can perform this action.

post.description: Resets an agent's used limit to zero. Only supervisors can perform this action.
Activates an account by setting the initial password using an activation token
Allows an authenticated user to change their password
Sends a password reset token to the email if it exists
Authenticates a user by email and password, returns JWT and refresh token
Generates a new access token using a valid refresh token
Resets the password using a valid reset token

parameters.description: Password reset token and new password
parameters.name: request

get.description: Returns a paginated list of clients. Supports filtering by email, first name, and last name. Requires ClientView permission.

post.description: Creates a new client account and sends an activation email

patch.description: Updates client details by ID. Requires ClientUpdate permission.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of employees with optional filtering

post.description: Creates a new employee account and returns the created employee

get.description: Returns a single employee by their ID

post.description: Sets the employee's active status to false

get.description: Returns TOTP secret for currently authenticated client

BearerAuth.description: Enter "Bearer" followed by a space and your token. Example: "Bearer eyJhbGci..."
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
